Hey at the 24/hr economy wank/shindig at Earp. I remember your question about raves..

Are you planning on opening a venue?
No, Thank you for all you do for the scene!

- Allow DJs? 
Yes
- Allow Bands? 
Yes
- Do you have a sound system & if known, what type? 
LU TO ADD
- Do you have a light system? 
LU TO ADD
- Do you have provided DJ decks?
DUNNY TO ADD (VINYL DECKS AND MIXER)
Sorry i have a couple more questions for above: 
- Cost or cost range of hire?
Free - $7000/ticketing fee Subject management approval and particular day
- Any emails you would like to include other than the public one (e.g. booking agents)?
In house Booking Agent:
Justan

Band bookers:
Justan
OakBandBooking@gmail.com

- Do you have a stage & if known, what dimensions?
LU/DUNNY TO ADD
- Any info on band production stuff (sound guy, drumkit, mics, monitor, console etc.)
LU/DUNNY TO ADD
- 1 image for your profile photo (preferably of a wide shot of the space) and 6 images for the gallery.
LU/DUNNY TO ADD

- Space capacity?
Front Band Room/Bar: 150
Whole venue: 800

- Type of venue? E.g. pub, cafe, bar, hotel
Bar
- Would there be any noise restrictions (decibels, curfew)? 
LA10
The LA10 noise level emitted from the licensed premises shall not exceed the background noise level in any Octave Band Centre (31.5Hz - 8kHz inclusive) by more than 5dB between 07:00 am and 12:00 midnight at the boundary of any affected residence.
The LA10 noise level emitted from the licensed premises shall not exceed the background noise level in any Octave Band Centre Frequency (31.5Hz - 8Khz inclusive) between 12:00 midnight and 07:00 am at the boundary of any affected residence.
Notwithstanding compliance with the above, the noise from the licensed premises shall not be audible within any habitable room in any residential premises between the hours of 12:00 midnight and 07:00 am.
No live music after Midnight:
No live entertainment is to be provided in the premises after 12:00 midnight.

Sweet, I have some deeper questions about the event room to add to the directory.

- Space capacity? 
- Type of venue? E.g. pub, cafe, bar, hotel 
- Would there be any noise restrictions (decibels, curfew)? 
- Allow DJs? 
- Allow Bands?

- Do you have a light system? 
- Do you have provided DJ decks?
Hey sam! Would be happy to get involved! Let us know what you need

Hi,

I wanted to reach out with some questions about your venue, The Oak. I am putting together a web directory of every space in Newcastle that can or cannot be hired for an event, whether that be for bands and/or DJâs.

The aim of this project is to connect you with promoters who can approach you with realistic expectations to hire out your venue, and maybe convince would-be promoters to take that chance and start their own events.

I have attached an example of what it could look like on desktops, it will also be accessible via mobile.

Is The Oak approachable for events?

Kind regards, 
Sam
Witchhouse
